---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, UI enhancement, or refactor for the web UI
title: "[Feature] <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "status:needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
If the request is about positioning functionality or a new `mrtk` CLI
capability, please open the issue on MRTKLIB instead:
https://github.com/h-shiono/MRTKLIB/issues
-->

## Motivation

<!--
What problem does this solve? Who benefits? Link any related issues,
discussions, or real-world use cases.
-->

## Proposed change

<!--
Describe the change from a user's perspective first (which tab, which
form field, what happens on click), then implementation-level detail
if you have one.
-->

## Affected area

<!--
Which part of the UI or stack is affected? Examples:
- Tab: Post Processing / Real-Time / Stream Server / Conversion / Tools / Monitor
- Component: sidebar, form panel, chart, file browser, preset manager
- Backend: API router, service, WebSocket, Docker image
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches, and why the proposed one is preferred. -->

## Backward compatibility

<!--
Does this break existing presets, TOML keys, API responses, or URL
routes? If yes, describe the migration path.
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, upstream MRTKLIB references, related issues. -->
